title: Wiring — SkillSearchPaths, SkillCatalog, and conditional registration
purpose: All skill infrastructure is built but nothing is connected. This brief wires the 7-tier search paths, SkillCatalog, and conditional SkillTool registration into build_runtime. When no skills exist, the SkillTool is not registered and no catalog section appears in the system prompt.
task: In norn-cli's build_runtime: construct the 7-tier skill search path list, build SkillSearchPaths and install on ToolContext, scan to build SkillCatalog and install as Arc<SkillCatalog>, conditionally register the SkillTool (only when catalog is non-empty), inject catalog listing into base system instruction, register skill slash commands.

requirements.title: skills_dir path helpers
requirements.spec: norn::config::paths SHALL provide a skills_dir() returning norn_dir()/skills/. norn-cli SHALL add project_skills_dir() and the .agents/skills/ and .claude/skills/ project paths.
acceptance: norn-cli exposes project path helpers for all 7 tiers

requirements.title: SkillSearchPaths and SkillCatalog construction
requirements.spec: WHEN build_runtime executes, it SHALL construct SkillSearchPaths from the 7-tier list, scan to build SkillCatalog, and install both on ToolContext.
acceptance: Paths are ordered per D1 (project .norn first, .meridian last)

requirements.title: Conditional SkillTool registration
requirements.spec: The SkillTool SHALL be registered in the tool registry ONLY when the SkillCatalog is non-empty. When no skills exist, the tool is not registered.
acceptance: With skills present, tool registry contains 'skill'
With no skills present, tool registry does NOT contain 'skill'
With no skills, no '# Available Skills' section in system prompt

requirements.title: Catalog listing in base system instruction
requirements.spec: WHEN the catalog is non-empty, its system_prompt_listing() SHALL be appended to system_sections[0] after profile instructions and context files.
acceptance: The base instruction contains '# Available Skills' when skills exist
The listing appears after NORN.md context (when present)
When catalog is empty, no skills section appears

requirements.title: Clean lint and format gates
requirements.spec: cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings SHALL pass clean. cargo fmt --check SHALL pass clean.

boundaries: SHALL NOT modify skill module internals — only wire them
SHALL NOT run in parallel with NX-005 (both modify builder.rs)
verification: cargo test -p norn -p norn-cli passes all tests
With test SKILL.md files, SkillTool returns expanded content (integration test)
With no skill files, SkillTool is not in registry and no catalog section in prompt
No file exceeds 500 lines of code (excluding tests, comments, whitespace)
